caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, a small red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with shirts. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the frame; the left side features a logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," and the right side shows a red logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and smaller text below it reading "LIFESTYLE & ENTERTAINMENT". Across the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position, shifting his facial expression and mouth movements as he speaks, while the background and studio equipment remain static.
